{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{\"channel_id\":\"\",\"request_id\":\"202603231501447B4E42610B53CED4F342\"}"},"total":11},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7595975866339361561","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"内容引人入胜，非常喜欢谍战剧"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1768578688,"group_id":"7580189606872632382","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N8r+XUeTQNIKA4LOyKGXvwFa0KNCi7qAai76/9ClGWKO","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-0000/3abe6a50e39b4bf1ba7c29f33074e1a8~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1\u0026x-expires=1776788850\u0026x-signature=sYCOa%2F9ZxoTl7Yne0kWtutXwoT0%3D","user_id":"3852310126800588","user_name":"喜欢哈士奇的元哲"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"3852310126800588","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7580189606872632382","book_info":{"abstract":"1943年，上海沦陷区表面平静下暗流涌动。代号“裁缝”的中共地下党员沈砚秋，以法租界高级裁缝店老板身份潜伏，负责重建被破坏的情报网。他的对手是日本特高课新任课长佐藤一郎，以及一个神秘的双面间谍“影子”。当沈砚秋发现自己的联络人竟是失散多年的恋人，而“影子”的真实身份将颠覆所有人的认知时，一场关乎信仰、爱情与生存的无声战争在旗袍与军装间悄然展开。","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-pic/p2o5c7a0b5521466bec25fd09f05bf775d5~tplv-tt-cs0:440:440.image","author":"顾阑珊516","author_id":"","book_id":"7580189606872632382","book_name":"抗日谍战：代号裁缝","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#103030","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"2047人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{\"category_id\":504,\"name\":\"抗战谍战\",\"schema\":\"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=504\u0026name=抗战谍战\u0026genre_t
